title: Intelligence Publishing and Story Map Studio policy
boundaries: No publication is made public without an explicit human editorial approval and publish confirmation.
Story sequence, spatial proximity, chart alignment, and temporal adjacency does not establish causation.
Conflicting evidence, limitations, missing data, and methodology notes must not be silently removed.
Unlisted publications are omitted from public directories but remain accessible through an exact identifier.
The studio does not fabricate sources, quotations, evidence, maps, or institutional approval.
WordPress handoffs are read-only and do not claim a successful remote write.
